name: shimmer
description: Animated shimmer overlay for loading placeholders. Exports two components from one file: Shimmer (standalone with its own animation loop) and ShimmerGroup (context provider that synchronizes multiple Shimmer instances into a single shared animation loop for better performance).

props.name: children
props.description: Content over which the shimmer sweep animation plays

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: Border radius applied to the shimmer container to clip the sweep animation

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the shimmer container

props.name: duration
props.description: Duration of one shimmer sweep cycle in milliseconds; ignored when inside a ShimmerGroup

ShimmerGroup.name: children
ShimmerGroup.description: Shimmer components whose animations will be synchronized

ShimmerGroup.name: duration
ShimmerGroup.description: Animation cycle duration in milliseconds shared across all child Shimmers

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<ShimmerGroup>
  <Shimmer borderRadius={8} style={{ height: 20, marginBottom: 8 }}>
    <View style={{ height: 20 }} />
  </Shimmer>
  <Shimmer borderRadius={8} style={{ height: 20 }}>
    <View style={{ height: 20 }} />
  </Shimmer>
</ShimmerGroup>

examples.label: Example 2
examples.code:
// Full card skeleton using ShimmerGroup with avatar + text lines
<ShimmerGroup>
  <Row gap="md" style={{ padding: spacing.md }}>
    <Shimmer borderRadius={999} style={{ width: 40, height: 40 }} />
    <Stack gap="xs" style={{ flex: 1 }}>
      <Shimmer borderRadius={4} style={{ height: 16, width: '70%' }} />
      <Shimmer borderRadius={4} style={{ height: 12, width: '50%' }} />
    </Stack>
  </Row>
</ShimmerGroup>

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Slow sweep for a larger skeleton block
<ShimmerGroup duration={2000}>
  <Shimmer borderRadius={8} style={{ height: 180 }} />
</ShimmerGroup>

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Standalone
<Shimmer borderRadius={8} style={{ height: 20, width: '80%' }}>
  <View style={{ height: 20 }} />
</Shimmer>

examples.label: Example 5
examples.code:
// Circular avatar placeholder
<Shimmer borderRadius={999} style={{ width: 48, height: 48 }} />

examples.label: Example 6
examples.code:
// Multiple text-line placeholders
<Stack gap="sm">
  <Shimmer borderRadius={4} style={{ height: 14, width: '90%' }} />
  <Shimmer borderRadius={4} style={{ height: 14, width: '75%' }} />
  <Shimmer borderRadius={4} style={{ height: 14, width: '60%' }} />
</Stack>
